title: Macvaughiella standleyi
taxonomy: Macvaughiella standleyi is a species of lichen, and its classification would place it within the kingdom Fungi and more specifically within the class Lecideomycetidae. It is a member of the family Gomphillaceae and the genus Macvaughiella. This classification highlights the unique characteristics of Macvaughiella standleyi, which are distinct from other species of lichens. As a lichen, Macvaughiella standleyi has a symbiotic relationship between fungi and algae or cyanobacteria. This combination of fungal and algal/cyanobacterial cells contributes to the lichen's ability to photosynthesize and thrive in a variety of environments.
